sentences.target: Ich bezahle digital mit dem Handy.

translations.de: Ich bezahle digital mit dem Handy.
translations.en: I pay digitally with my phone.
translations.vi: Tôi thanh toán bằng điện thoại.
translations.hi: मैं फोन से भुगतान करता हूँ.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb 'bezahle'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; predicate of the clause.
Adverb of manner modifying 'bezahle'; invariable form used adverbially.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the prepositional phrase indicating instrument.
Definite article, dative singular neuter; determiner of 'Handy' within the PP.
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'mit' (dative), denoting the instrument.

sentences.target: Die Fotos sind digital und auf dem USB-Stick.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈfoːtoːs zɪnt diɡiˈtaːl ʊnt aʊ̯f deːm uːɛsˈbeː ʃtɪk./

translations.de: Die Fotos sind digital und auf dem USB-Stick.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈfoːtoːs zɪnt diɡiˈtaːl ʊnt aʊ̯f deːm uːɛsˈbeː ʃtɪk./
translations.en: The photos are digital and on the USB stick.
translations.es: Las fotos son digitales y están en la memoria USB.
translations.fr: Les photos sont numériques et sur la clé USB.
translations.it: Le foto sono digitali e sono sulla chiavetta USB.
translations.zh-Hans: 照片是数码的，保存在U盘里。
translations.yue: 啲相係數碼嘅，喺USB手指度。
translations.pt: As fotos são digitais e estão no pen drive.
translations.vi: Ảnh là ảnh số và nằm trên ổ USB.
translations.nl: De foto’s zijn digitaal en staan op de USB-stick.
translations.hu: A fotók digitálisak és a pendrive-on vannak.
translations.hi: तस्वीरें डिजिटल हैं और यूएसबी ड्राइव पर हैं.
translations.pl: Zdjęcia są cyfrowe i na pendrive’ie.
translations.el: Οι φωτογραφίες είναι ψηφιακές και βρίσκονται στο στικάκι USB.
translations.nb: Bildene er digitale og ligger på minnepinnen.
translations.id: Foto-foto itu digital dan ada di flashdisk.
translations.sv: Bilderna är digitala och finns på USB-minnet.
translations.ro: Fotografiile sunt digitale și sunt pe stickul USB.
translations.cs: Fotky jsou digitální a jsou na USB flashce.
translations.da: Billederne er digitale og ligger på USB-stikket.
translations.ja: 写真はデジタルで、USBメモリに入っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiner of 'Fotos'.
Common noun, plural; subject of the copular verb 'sind'.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person plural; links the subject to the predicate complements.
Predicative adjective complement to 'sind', describing the subject 'Fotos'.
Coordinating conjunction; links the predicative adjective 'digital' with the locative PP 'auf dem USB-Stick'.
Preposition governing dative in a static/locative sense; introduces the PP expressing location.
Definite article, dative singular masculine; determiner of 'USB-Stick' in the PP.
Compound common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'auf' (dative), giving the storage location.

sentences.target: Meine Uhr ist digital und mit Licht.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə uːɐ̯ ɪst diɡiˈtaːl ʊnt mɪt lɪçt./

translations.de: Meine Uhr ist digital und mit Licht.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə uːɐ̯ ɪst diɡiˈtaːl ʊnt mɪt lɪçt./
translations.en: My watch is digital and has a light.
translations.es: Mi reloj es digital y tiene luz.
translations.fr: Ma montre est numérique et elle s’éclaire.
translations.it: Il mio orologio è digitale e ha la luce.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的手表是数码的，而且有灯光。
translations.yue: 我隻錶係數碼嘅，仲有燈。
translations.ru: Мои часы цифровые и с подсветкой.
translations.pt: Meu relógio é digital e tem luz.
translations.he: השעון שלי דיגיטלי ויש בו תאורה.
translations.vi: Đồng hồ của tôi là điện tử và có đèn.
translations.nl: Mijn horloge is digitaal en heeft verlichting.
translations.uk: Мій годинник цифровий і з підсвіткою.
translations.hu: Az órám digitális és van benne világítás.
translations.hi: मेरी घड़ी डिजिटल है और इसमें लाइट है.
translations.pl: Mój zegarek jest cyfrowy i ma podświetlenie.
translations.el: Το ρολόι μου είναι ψηφιακό και έχει φωτισμό.
translations.nb: Klokka mi er digital og har lys.
translations.id: Jam saya digital dan punya lampu.
translations.sv: Min klocka är digital och har ljus.
translations.ro: Ceasul meu este digital și are lumină.
translations.cs: Moje hodinky jsou digitální и mají světлo.
translations.da: Mit ur er digitalt og har lys.
translations.fi: Kelloni on digitaalinen ja siinä on valo.
translations.ja: 私の時計はデジタルで、ライトがついています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative singular feminine; modifies 'Uhr'.
Common noun, feminine; subject of the copular verb 'ist'.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links the subject to predicate complements.
Predicative adjective complement to 'ist', describing the subject 'Uhr'.
Coordinating conjunction; links the predicative adjective with the PP 'mit Licht'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a PP indicating an accompanying feature.
Common noun, neuter, dative singular (form identical to nominative); object of 'mit', indicating the feature.

sentences.target: Der Unterricht läuft digital seit letzter Woche.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈʊntɐʁɪçt lɔɪ̯ft diɡiˈtaːl zaɪ̯t ˈlɛtstɐ ˈvɔxə./

translations.de: Der Unterricht läuft digital seit letzter Woche.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈʊntɐʁɪçt lɔɪ̯ft diɡiˈtaːl zaɪ̯t ˈlɛtstɐ ˈvɔxə./
translations.en: Classes have been digital since last week.
translations.es: Desde la semana pasada, las clases son online.
translations.fr: Depuis la semaine dernière, les cours sont en ligne.
translations.it: Dalla settimana scorsa le lezioni sono online.
translations.zh-Hans: 从上周开始，课程改为线上进行。
translations.yue: 由上星期開始，課堂轉做網上進行。
translations.ru: С прошлой недели занятия проходят онлайн.
translations.pt: Desde a semana passada, as aulas são online.
translations.he: מאז השבוע שעבר השיעורים מתקיימים אונליין.
translations.tr: Geçen haftadan beri dersler çevrim içi yapılıyor.
translations.vi: Từ tuần trước, các lớp học diễn ra trực tuyến.
translations.ar: منذ الأسبوع الماضي تُقام الدروس عبر الإنترنت.
translations.nl: Sinds vorige week zijn de lessen online.
translations.uk: З минулого тижня заняття проходять онлайн.
translations.hu: Múlt hét óta az órák online zajlanak.
translations.hi: पिछले हफ्ते से कक्षाएँ ऑनलाइन हो रही हैं.
translations.pl: Od zeszłego tygodnia zajęcia odbywają się online.
translations.el: Από την περασμένη εβδομάδα τα μαθήματα γίνονται διαδικτυακά.
translations.nb: Siden forrige uke foregår undervisningen på nett.
translations.id: Sejak minggu lalu, kelas berlangsung secara online.
translations.sv: Sedan förra veckan sker undervisningen online.
translations.ro: De săptămâna trecută, cursurile se desfășoară online.
translations.cs: Od minulého týdne probíhá výuka online.
translations.da: Siden sidste uge foregår undervisningen online.
translations.fi: Viime viikosta lähtien opetus on verkossa.
translations.ja: 先週から授業はオンラインになりました。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular masculine; determiner of 'Unterricht'.
Common noun, masculine; subject of the intransitive verb 'läuft'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicate meaning 'operates/runs'.
Adverb of manner modifying 'läuft'; indicates the mode of instruction.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a temporal PP marking the starting point.
Attributive adjective, dative singular feminine (strong inflection); modifies 'Woche'.
Common noun, feminine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'seit', expressing the time frame.
